Bash(cd /tmp/compose_check && jar tf classes.jar | while read cls; do
    [[ "$cls" == *.class ]] || continue
    classname=$\(echo "$cls" | sed 's/\\.class$//' | tr '/' '.'\)

        echo "=== $classname ==="
        echo "$methods"
    fi
done)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/home/ibrahim/AndroidStudioProjects/facerecon/OPPO-CPH1803-Android-8.1_2026-06-12_143739.logcat'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
# Check structure

    entries = data.get\('events', data.get\('logs', data.get\('entries', []\)\)\)
    if not entries:
        print\('Keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)[:10]\)
elif isinstance\(data, list\):
    entries = data
    print\('List of', len\(entries\), 'items, first type:', type\(entries[0]\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('OPPO-CPH1803-Android-8.1_2026-06-12_143739.logcat'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
msgs = data.get\('logcatMessages', []\)
print\(f'Total logcat messages: {len\(msgs\)}'\)
# Print keys of first message
if msgs:
    print\('Keys:', list\(msgs[0].keys\(\)\)\)
# Filter for app-related errors
for m in msgs:
    msg_text = m.get\('message', ''\) + m.get\('body', ''\) + m.get\('tag', ''\)
    level = m.get\('level', ''\)
    if 'facerecon' in msg_text.lower\(\) or 'himo' in msg_text.lower\(\) or level in \('E', 'F'\):
        print\(f'[{level}] {m.get\(\\"tag\\",\\"\\"\)}: {m.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)[:200]}'\)
" 2>&1 | head -80
)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('OPPO-CPH1803-Android-8.1_2026-06-12_143739.logcat'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
msgs = data.get\('logcatMessages', []\)
# Find image picking related errors
for m in msgs:
    msg = m.get\('message', ''\)
    header = m.get\('header', ''\)
    combined = msg + ' ' + header
    lower = combined.lower\(\)
    if any\(k in lower for k in ['photo', 'pick', 'image', 'uri', 'content://', 'mediastore', 'visual', 'activityresult', 'picker', 'filenotfound', 'permission_denied', 'contentresolver']\):
        print\(f'{header[:80]}'\)
        print\(f'  {msg[:200]}'\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -80
)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('OPPO-CPH1803-Android-8.1_2026-06-12_143739.logcat'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
msgs = data.get\('logcatMessages', []\)
for m in msgs:
    msg = m.get\('message', ''\)
    hdr = m.get\('header', {}\)
    tag = hdr.get\('tag', ''\) if isinstance\(hdr, dict\) else ''
    level = hdr.get\('logLevel', ''\) if isinstance\(hdr, dict\) else ''
    lower = \(msg + ' ' + tag\).lower\(\)
    if any\(k in lower for k in ['pick', 'photo_picker', 'visual', 'mediastore', 'uri', 'content://', 'filenotfound', 'contentresolver', 'decode', 'bitmap', 'exif', 'image_load']\):
        if 'facerecon' in lower or level == 'ERROR' or level == 'WARN' or tag:
            print\(f'[{level}] {tag}: {msg[:250]}'\)
" 2>&1 | head -60
)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('OPPO-CPH1803-Android-8.1_2026-06-12_143739.logcat'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
msgs = data.get\('logcatMessages', []\)
# Find ERROR level messages or app-specific messages
for m in msgs:
    msg = m.get\('message', ''\)
    hdr = m.get\('header', {}\)
    tag = hdr.get\('tag', ''\) if isinstance\(hdr, dict\) else ''
    level = hdr.get\('logLevel', ''\) if isinstance\(hdr, dict\) else ''
    if level in \('ERROR', 'FATAL'\):
        print\(f'[{level}] {tag}: {msg[:300]}'\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -80
)
